nasb.text: Ish-bosheth, Saul’s son, was forty years old when he became king over Israel, and he was king for two years. The house of Judah, however, followed David.

esv.text: Ish-bosheth, Saul’s son, was forty years old when he began to reign over Israel, and he reigned two years. But the house of Judah followed David.

cnv.text: 掃羅的兒子伊施波設作以色列王的時候，已經四十歲；他作王共兩年。猶大家卻追隨大衛。

ccb.text: 扫罗的儿子伊施波设四十岁登基，统治以色列两年。犹大支派则跟随大卫。
